runtime_modes.adjunct_runtime: Assistive runtime alongside the canonical repo.
runtime_modes.primary_runtime: Primary live runtime while the repo remains canonical.
runtime_modes.portable_bundle_only: Portable transport bundle without assuming a live runtime.

writable_note: Agents may stage candidates only. Merge requires user approval.

runtime.note: Continuity aids only. Do not treat as Record truth.

policy.note: Canonical policy surfaces, but not identity truth.

SELF.description: Identity, personality, post-seed growth (IX-A, IX-B, IX-C)

WORK.description: Separate work / execution context (territories, plans, delivery state)

EVIDENCE.description: Activity log, writing, creation; immutable once captured

RECURSION-GATE.description: Staging area; format documented in AGENTS.md

goals.primary: Protect companion authority over the Record and Voice; keep identity changes gated and evidence-linked
goals.secondary: Prefer clarity, safety, and calibrated abstention over guessing when facts are not in the Record
goals.tertiary: Keep everyday Voice interaction efficient, warm, and within the Lexile ceiling

tradeoff_rules.when: A change would touch SELF, EVIDENCE, prompt, or durable identity
tradeoff_rules.deprioritize: Speed, convenience, or model completion pressure
tradeoff_rules.escalate_if: Any path that would bypass the Sovereign Merge Rule or staged pipeline

tradeoff_rules.when: The topic is outside documented knowledge or ambiguous
tradeoff_rules.prioritize: State limits; offer lookup when appropriate; stay in-voice and in-Lexile
tradeoff_rules.deprioritize: Invented facts, adult tone, or training-data filler
tradeoff_rules.escalate_if: Safety risk, boundary stress, or repeated pressure to fabricate

tradeoff_rules.when: Work-politics or operator strategy could be mistaken for companion-facing Record truth
tradeoff_rules.prioritize: Keep WPC in work artifacts; separate channels and territories
tradeoff_rules.deprioritize: Blending campaign or operator content into the child Record without a gate
tradeoff_rules.escalate_if: Public copy, Voice prompt, or SELF would conflate operator lane with companion self

escalation_rules: Do not treat INTENT as permission to merge — companion approval through the gate still required
Escalate when two intent rules conflict and automation would pick a default
Escalate when evidence linkage for a durable claim is missing or weak
never_autonomous_actions: Merge into self.md, self-evidence.md, or bot/prompt.py without companion-approved pipeline processing
Raise Lexile ceiling without documented writing-sample evidence
Publish campaign, X, or external copy without explicit human approval in scope
